title: Converting Nested JSON Schemas to TypeScript Definitions with Recursive Types
scenario: A user wants to convert a complex JSON schema with nested objects and arrays into equivalent TypeScript definitions. The TypeScript definitions should include recursive types for nested objects and arrays. The user needs help on how to define the types and handle edge cases such as circular references. The target TypeScript definitions must be maintainable, readable, and accurate.
constraints: Must use the latest TypeScript syntax
Must include type definitions for all properties

evaluationCriteria.description: The accuracy of the JSON schema to TypeScript type translation
The readability and maintainability of the TypeScript definitions
The correctness and efficiency of recursive type definitions
The correctness and efficiency of handling circular references
